product_description: Mathway is an online platform and mobile application that provides instant solutions and step-by-step explanations for various math problems across subjects like algebra, calculus, and statistics. It aims to make on-demand math assistance accessible to all students.

other_resources.text: How to: Use Mathway (a problem-solving app) (AT Help Desk)
other_resources.justification: Published by an 'AT Help Desk,' this guide describes Mathway as an invaluable tool for those who struggle with math, detailing features like camera and microphone input for problem entry, which are relevant for accessibility.

other_resources.text: Mathway Offers Step-by-Step Math Solutions (Assistive Technology at Easter Seals Crossroads)
other_resources.justification: This article from an assistive technology organization highlights Mathway's features for understanding and solving math problems, stating it makes assistance 'accessible to all students' and detailing its problem-solving capabilities.
